title: cynoglossum monophlebium
intro: Cynoglossum monophlebium, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cynoglossum monophlebium include its potential to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a vulnerary to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cynoglossum monophlebium include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be taken orally or applied topically to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
